question: Based on the chart of website visitors over the 14‑day period, which statement is most accurate when comparing the first 7 days to the last 7 days?

options.A: Total visitors over the first 7 days exceed those over the last 7 days.
options.B: Total visitors over the last 7 days exceed those over the first 7 days.
options.C: The total number of visitors is the same for the first and last 7 days.
options.D: The chart suggests that visitors were higher toward the end of the period.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the first segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
